overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, starting from a covered underpass, crossing a street with futuristic vehicles, passing a food vendor stall with NPCs, and continuing along an industrial sidewalk with neon signage and graffiti-covered walls. The footage is from a video game engine, featuring high-quality cinematic lighting and detailed futuristic urban architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass with distinctive orange tiled flooring. The camera moves forward toward a crosswalk where a futuristic sedan passes by, then transitions onto the open crosswalk. The environment is sheltered but opens up to the street, with neon lights visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes a food vendor stall situated under the overpass, where several NPCs are gathered. Large holographic billboards and neon wall advertisements illuminate the area with purple and cyan light. The ground remains the distinctive orange tile pattern as the camera moves past vending machines and the food cart.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the vendor area, the scene transitions to a narrower industrial sidewalk flanked by a green metal building wall on the right with prominent danger signs. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead while futuristic vehicles pass on the street to the left, separated by a metal railing. Overhead industrial pipes and ducts run along the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with graffiti and utility structures

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the industrial sidewalk where the building wall now features prominent graffiti. The camera passes a pedestrian with distinctive pink hair walking in the opposite direction. Large air conditioning units and additional industrial infrastructure are visible on the right, while the street with moving traffic remains visible beyond the railing to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into a dense, industrial cyberpunk corridor. It begins beneath a concrete overpass on orange tiled flooring, moving forward across a crosswalk as a futuristic sedan glides past. As the camera advances, the space opens into a vibrant vendor area where holographic billboards and neon advertisements cast purple and cyan light over gathered NPCs and vending machines. The scene then shifts from the open plaza to a narrower industrial sidewalk, passing under overhead pipes and ducts while following a pedestrian alongside a green metal wall marked with danger signs. Finally, the path continues past large air conditioning units and graffiti-covered walls, crossing paths with a pink-haired pedestrian while futuristic traffic continues to flow beyond a metal railing.
